overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a train journey along an elevated highway through a futuristic dystopian city. The camera moves steadily forward under an overcast sky, overlooking moderate traffic on multi-lane roads below while passing towering neon-lit buildings and a distinctive blue NCPD structure.

agents.ego_description: traveling steadily on an elevated train track, moving forward under the metal archway with the NCPD building visible on the right

entered.detail: large industrial metal structure spanning across the elevated track above the camera
tall blue building with NCPD signage and large vertical neon signs reading UNDER CONSTRUCTION
single palm tree visible in the center distance between the buildings
large suspension bridge visible in the foggy distance at the end of the highway
cluster of tall dark skyscrapers with illuminated windows on the left skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from an elevated train traveling under a massive metal archway. The distinctive blue NCPD building dominates the right side with bright neon signage, while a suspension bridge looms in the hazy distance. The camera moves steadily forward, approaching a palm tree in the center of the view.

events.description: passing out from under the overhead archway into open air with unobstructed view of the approaching suspension bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated track as the palm tree passes by on the left, with clearer views of the bridge and traffic below

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the highway below, moving in the same direction as the camera

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the archway, the scene opens up with a clearer view of the suspension bridge ahead. The NCPD building recedes to the right as the camera moves past the central palm tree. Traffic flows steadily on the multi-lane highway below, with a white sedan visible driving in the same direction as the train.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from beneath a heavy industrial structure into a wide, open vista of a futuristic cityscape. It begins as the camera glides under a massive metal archway, with a bright blue NCPD building and its neon signage dominating the right side of the frame while a suspension bridge looms in the hazy distance. As the train moves forward, the camera approaches a central palm tree, causing the oppressive architecture of the archway to fall away. The scene then opens up to reveal a clearer view of the distant bridge and the multi-lane highway below, where a white sedan flows with the traffic. Finally, the NCPD building recedes into the periphery as the camera passes the palm tree and advances further into the urban expanse.
